case_title: XU SHENG TANG VS. 101 CONSTRUCTION CO. INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, XU SHENG AS TO DEFENDANT 101 CONSTRUCTION CO. INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
